reasoning: The main limiter is your lactate clearance, highlighted by the 9.3% drop from your 5-min to 20-min power. This workout directly addresses this through over-unders to enhance your aerobic base and fatigue resistance. Considering your last ride was a lower intensity aerobic build, this session is a crucial step towards sustaining a higher power output for the Alpine Loop main climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x (6 min @ 242-256W, 4 min @ 201-218W) with 5 min recovery @ 50% FTP after each set

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
